parsed_output.justification: James provides highly contradictory claims, first stating he was the Seer and later claiming he was a Werewolf. He then attempts to shift the Werewolf role onto Elliot by claiming Elliot robbed him, which is a common tactic for a Werewolf to deflect suspicion. This erratic behavior and the blatant admission of having been a Werewolf make him the most suspicious player in the game.
